revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=APIQuery_categorymembers%2Ftable here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=APIQuery_categorymembers%2Ftable for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
[[WP:Namespace|Namespaces]] in use as of February 2025:

*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=0}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=2}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=4}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=6}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=8}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=10}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=12}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=14}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=100}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=118}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=710}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=828}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=1728}}
<noinclude>
{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! -->

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Pages without wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=APIQuery_categorymembers%2Ftable here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
[[WP:Namespace|Namespaces]] in use as of February 2025:

*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=0}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=2}}
*{{APIQuery categorymembers/row|CATPAGE={{{CATPAGE|{{PAGENAMEE}}}}}|cmnamespace=4}}

</noinclude>

</noinclude>
